mapper.select: /* adm-item-substitution-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkSubstitution */ SELECT A.OWKEY ,C.OWNM ,A.ICKEY ,B.ICNM ,A.SBKEY ,A.ICUNITTYPE ,A.UDF1 ,A.UDF2 ,A.UDF3 ,A.CLOSDATE ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,B.ICUNITKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ICSB A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND A.SBKEY = #{sbkey}
/* adm-item-substitution-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstCt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , CTKEY , CTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_CT WHERE MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N'

/* adm-item-substitution-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemCodeType */ SELECT A.ICUNITTYPE AS FIELD1 , B.ADCDDTNM AS FIELD2 , A.ICUNITKEY AS FIELD3 , A.LENGTH AS FIELD4 , A.WIDTH AS FIELD5 , A.HEIGHT AS FIELD6 , A.WEIGHT/1000 AS FIELD7 , A.VOL/1000 AS FIELD8 , A.ICUNITQTY AS FIELD9 FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT B.ADCDDTKEY , B.ADCDDTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_ADCD_HD A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADCD_DT B ON A.ADCDHDKEY = B.ADCDHDKEY AND A.ADCDHDKEY ='ICUTTYPE' AND B.LAKEY = #{slakey} ) B ON A.ICUNITTYPE = B.ADCDDTKEY WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICUNITKEY = #{icunitkey}
